rules.rule_text:
rule b64_docx
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$b64_zip = "UEs"
		$docx1 = "d29yZC9fcmVsc"
		$docx2 = "Zm9udFRhYmxl"
		$docx3 = "ZG9jUHJvcHM"
		$docx4 = "Q29udGVudF9UeXBlcw"
		$docx5 = "c2V0dGluZ3M"

	condition:
		$b64_zip at 0 and 3 of ( $docx* )
}
